title: 3-Node & 4-Node Motif Census with DAG Null Models, Z-Scores, and Capability Clustering on 34 Attribution Graphs
summary: Demo notebook running Circuit Motif Spectroscopy on 8 Neuronpedia attribution graphs (one per capability domain). Computes 3-node motif census, generates 50 DAG-preserving null models per graph via degree-preserving edge swaps, and computes Z-scores. Performs spectral clustering on enriched motif features (count ratios + Z-magnitude + graph statistics) vs baseline graph statistics. Reproduces key findings: H1 DISCONFIRM (only 030T/FFL universally overrepresented, Z~31 in 8/8 domains) and H2 CONFIRM (NMI=0.800 at K=4, outperforming baseline NMI=0.737). Includes 4-panel visualization: motif ratios by domain, Z-score boxplots, NMI comparison, and t-SNE projection.
